title: WINMAU Darts - Masters Pro Premium Bristle Dartboard Set - Includes Dart Board, Darts, Flights, Shafts and Oche Strip - Professional Steel Tip Dartboard Set for Adults
features: PROFESSIONAL TOURNAMENT STANDARD: The Winmau dartboard is made from premium bristle fibers, ensuring durability and self-healing capabilities. It complies with tournament regulations, giving players an authentic professional experience.

COMPLETE READY-TO-PLAY SET: This set includes a regulation-size dartboard, steel tip darts, flights, shafts, and an oche strip. Perfect for adults looking to start playing immediately with a full, professional setup.

STEEL TIP DARTS FOR ACCURACY: High-quality steel tip darts are designed for precision and control. The durable shafts and flights improve balance, making every throw more accurate for both casual and competitive players.

PREMIUM BRISTLE DARTBOARD: The durable, long-lasting bristle dartboard is designed for frequent use and self-heals, making it ideal for continuous play while maintaining premium quality throughout its lifespan.

IDEAL FOR INDOOR USE: Whether in a home game room, bar, or club, this dartboard set is perfect for indoor use. Its professional design and regulation specifications make it an excellent choice for any serious player looking for a quality experience.
